chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 498 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.04.2022 For orders as to non-prosecution Mr. Muhammad Humayoon Khan, Deputy Attorney General None present for petitioner. As an indulgence adjourned to a date to be fixed after three weeks; in case no one appears on the next date this petition shall be dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
